_comment: Claude Code MCP registration for the Session Indexer. Replace the args path with the ABSOLUTE path to mcp-server.js on your machine. CSI_CLAUDE_DIR is optional (defaults to ~/.claude); set it to point at an alternate transcript root (e.g. a demo fixture). To register from the CLI instead of pasting this, run: claude mcp add claude-session-indexer --scope user -- node /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/web/mcp-server.js
